title: Ctenopteris gracilis
taxonomy: Ctenopteris gracilis is classified as a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. This family is a group of ferns commonly known as wood ferns. Ctenopteris gracilis is native to New Zealand and is considered a rare or threatened species in some regions. The classification of this plant is based on its physical characteristics, including its frond shape and leaf arrangement. Further research may be necessary to confirm its exact classification within the plant kingdom.
